question: Did the port drift away from original TC4?
answer: Partially in Stage163 due to virtual slots; corrected in Stage165 with persistent two-slot table inventory.
corrected_deviation: Stage163 virtual slot 0/1 is no longer the primary model
ResearchTableMenu exposes those slots to GUI
remaining_intentional_adapters: Forge 1.19.2 networking/menu code replaces 1.7.10 Container/Gui classes
Old held-note lookup remains as compatibility fallback only
forbidden_for_future: Do not invent research puzzle rules
Do not create fake recipes to cover unresolved TC4 data
